## What needs improving?

- [ ] Storybook story / examples
- [ ] README or project docs
- [ ] Inline JSDoc / types
- [ ] Usage guide or migration notes
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Current state

Where is the gap? (e.g. "Button story doesn’t show disabled state" or "No example for error validation.")

Link or path if relevant: 

## Suggested improvement

What you’d like to see (e.g. extra examples, clearer wording, new section).

## Additional context

Any screenshots, links, or references.
